traits.name: Flyby
traits.desc: The wasp doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Sting
actions.desc:
*Melee Weapon Attack:* +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. 
***Hit:*** 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage. 
The target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking the poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. 
If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

monsters.name: Half-Dragon
monsters.senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 15

traits.name: Draconic Origin
traits.desc: Choose one: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. The half-dragon gains resistance to that damage type.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The half-dragon makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) slashing + 7 (2d6) damage of the chosen type.

actions.name: Dragon’s Breath (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: Exhales in a 30-foot cone. DC 14 Dex save. 28 (8d6) damage of the chosen type on failure, half on success.

monsters.name: Glow Toad
monsters.damage_resistances: poison, bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons
monsters.languages: understands Common and Sylvan but can’t speak

traits.name: Colorful Skin
traits.desc: The glow toad changes color depending on its mood: Yellow (regular), Pink (happy), Red (angry), Purple (guilty), Blue (concerned), Green (afraid).

traits.name: Illumination
traits.desc: As a bonus action, the glow toad can shed dim light in a 10-foot radius or extinguish the light.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The glow toad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Lick
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Light Flash (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: The glow toad emits a fierce light from the dark spots on its body. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become blinded until the end of the glow toad’s next turn.

actions.name: Invisibility
actions.desc: The glow toad magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses its Light Flash, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the glow toad wears or carries is invisible with it.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc:
The goblin hexer casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as its spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
• At will: minor illusion
• 1/day each: blindness/deafness, faerie fire, grease

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The goblin hexer makes two Hex Stick attacks. It can replace one of these attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Hex Stick
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) psychic damage.

reactions.name: Jinx
reactions.desc: Trigger: A creature the goblin hexer can see hits it with an attack roll. The triggering creature must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the attack misses.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The goblin boss makes two attacks, using its Scimitar or Shortbow in any combination.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage. If the attack roll had advantage, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage. If the attack roll had advantage, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.desc: The goblin boss takes the Disengage or Hide action.

reactions.name: Redirect Attack
reactions.desc: Trigger: A creature the goblin boss can see makes an attack roll against it. The goblin boss chooses a Small or Medium ally within 5 feet. The goblin boss and that ally swap places, and the ally becomes the target of the attack instead.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage. If the attack roll had advantage, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage. If the attack roll had advantage, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.desc: The goblin warrior takes the Disengage or Hide action.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.desc: The goblin minion takes the Disengage or Hide action.

traits.name: Parry
traits.desc: When the noble is hit by a melee attack, it can use its reaction to add 3 to its AC for that attack, potentially causing the attack to miss.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The noble makes two Gold-Tinted Sword attacks.

actions.name: Gold-Tinted Sword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) slashing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Summon Sword
bonus_actions.desc: The noble magically summons the Gold-Tinted Sword to its hand. The sword appears instantly in its grasp.

bonus_actions.name: Leap
bonus_actions.desc: The noble jumps up to 30 feet in any direction, costing 10 feet of movement. It must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity check or fall prone and slide an extra 5 feet in the direction it jumped from.

monsters.name: Thrumbo
monsters.damage_resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
monsters.senses: blindsight 60 ft., darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 12

traits.name: Charge
traits.desc: If the Thrumbo moves at least 30 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a Horn Slash attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 10 (3d6) slashing damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The Thrumbo has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.desc: The Thrumbo has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put it to sleep.

traits.name: Indomitable (2/Day)
traits.desc: The Thrumbo can reroll a failed saving throw. It must use the new roll.

traits.name: Ice Aura
traits.desc: Any creature that comes within 5 feet of the Thrumbo takes 1d6 cold damage. A creature takes 1d6 cold damage every turn it starts its turn within the aura. The aura also wards off any nonmagical fire attacks.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.desc: The Thrumbo regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If it takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. The Thrumbo dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Thrumbo makes three attacks: two with its horn and one with Stomp.

actions.name: Horn Slash
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.

actions.name: Stomp
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.

actions.name: Cone of Cold (3/Day)
actions.desc: The Thrumbo exhales a blast of cold air in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature killed by this effect becomes a frozen statue until it thaws.

legendary_actions.name: Aura Explosion (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The Thrumbo's magical aura surges. Each creature within 10 feet of it must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 15 (2d10 + 4) cold damage and being knocked back 5 feet on a failed save. On a successful save, the creature takes half the damage and is not knocked back.

legendary_actions.name: Horn Slash
legendary_actions.desc: The Thrumbo makes one Horn Slash attack.

legendary_actions.name: Move
legendary_actions.desc: The Thrumbo moves up to half its speed (20 ft.) in any direction.
